hero.subtitulo: Specialized equipment for aggregate extraction with maximum reliability

articulo1.descripcion: With over 50 years in the industry, we are leaders in aggregate extraction solutions in the region.

articulo2.descripcion: Our mobile plants use the most modern technology to guarantee maximum efficiency.

articulo3.descripcion: Committed to environmentally friendly practices in all our projects.

companyAbout.descripcion: We are a company with over 50 years of experience in the aggregate extraction sector. Originally from Orihuela, we have grown to become leaders in the Murcia region, Alicante province and surrounding areas. Our commitment to quality, safety and sustainability has earned us the trust of hundreds of clients.

services.label: Our Services
services.titulo: We count on services to cover your needs
services.descripcion: We have specialized machinery for every type of aggregate extraction project.

extraccion.descripcion: Specialized equipment for efficient aggregate extraction in different types of terrain.

procesamiento.descripcion: Classification and processing of aggregates according to customer specifications.

transporte.descripcion: Complete transport and logistics solutions for your projects.

asesoramiento.descripcion: Experts available to help you choose the most suitable solution.

mantenimiento.descripcion: Specialized technical service to ensure optimal operation.

sostenibilidad.descripcion: Committed to sustainable and environmentally friendly practices.

projects.label: Portfolio
projects.descripcion: Learn about some of our most outstanding operations in Murcia, Alicante and surrounding provinces. We offer highly reliable mobile plants adapted to the scope of each project.

experiencia.descripcion: Decades of industry experience guarantee quality results.

tecnologia.descripcion: Latest generation equipment for maximum efficiency.

servicio.descripcion: We adapt our solutions to your specific needs.

seguridad.descripcion: Full compliance with safety and hygiene regulations.
